text:
Biabam is deprecated, but certain people still use it!

I'm offering to host it.

Fix: 

- Change to new MASTER_SITE
- Pass maintainership to submitter
- Make REINPLACE quicker by restricting to first line

Submitted by: Chris Rees (utisoft@gmail.com)

[1] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/biabam-master-sites.diff
